chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 198 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.04.2026. Mr. Arsalan Ali Arain, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, A.P.G for State along with ASI Waqas Ahmed PS Hussainabad. = SHO PS Hussaibabad has filed a report wherein he has disclosed that as per the police information the alleged detenue Mst. Zoha Manzoor and respondent No.6 Jabbar are residing in “Rahim Yar Khan”. This information is also corroborated by CNIC of the alleged detenue which indicates that her present and permanent addresses both are in “Rahim Yar Khan”. The address of the applicant Noman Shahid as per the affidavit of freewill is also shown as “Rahim Yar Khan”. Although the alleged Nikahnama appears to have been registered in Hyderabad the entire relief sought is in “Rahim Yar Khan”, as is the permanent address of the applicant, the detenue and the respondent No.6 Jabbar-all are anchored in “Rahim Yar Khan”. The applicant has also impleaded Police Authorities in “Rahim Yar Khan”. Last but not least the applicant has not approached the appropriate Sessions Court in the first instance and has knocked on the door step of this (High) Court without exhausting his remedy before the Sessions Court. In the circumstances and given the above, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed. The applicant may move appropriate application before the competent Sessions Court and/or seek remedy in accordance with law before the police authorities having competent jurisdiction and/or trigger any other provision available to him under the Code of Criminal Procedure to claim relief.

In the circumstances and given the above, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed. The applicant may move appropriate application before the competent Sessions Court and/or seek remedy in accordance with law before the police authorities having competent jurisdiction and/or trigger any other provision available to him under the Code of Criminal Procedure to claim relief. JUDGE
